TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == mitupinay tu labang a balunga ťĀäŤČá == mitupinay tu labang a balunga (igu: yacht, namaka He-lan a kamuan: jacht ) u sakay papahanhanan nu kawawan " mahida u pacunaay, papacemutan tu buting, kapulungan masakaputay, sasasetsetan sa" a micapiay tu dadipasan nanay a bayuan " langdaway a nanum" atu minininggukayay a bayuan " sumilaway a nanum" nu balungaan, mihelupay tu bali nu payapayan a balungaan " sailing yaht", sisapaday a balungaan " hydrofoil yacht", sibesuay a balungaan " hovercraft Yacht", lalaay sisapaday nu balungaan " Ground Effect Wing Yacht", hunsiki a balungaan " jet yacht" atu kikayay nu balungaan " motor yacht" enem a kasasidumaan. aydaay a imian ina balungaan u caay sipakayda i tulaku mikacaw a patasasa, u adidiay a minatuan musaluimeng a caay kaw tabakiay nu balungaan, i nu udip ta a balungan ku mahiniay. hucunu tanayu a balunga makaala tu 9.8‚ÄĒ10.7 kun-ce, tabakiay a balungaan makaala tu 30 kun-ce, milakuyt tu 61 kun-ce a micidekay tu nu tabakiay a balungaan " superyacht". ťĀäŤČá(ŤčĪŤ™ě:yacht,śļźŤá™Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:jacht) ( hovercraft Yacht), . mahiniay a mitupinay tu labang a balungaan caay kaw matekesay, ina tabakiay nu kapahay a balungaan nu aydaay u sakapahay a balungaan, pangangan han tu sapitupin tu labang a balungaan han sakay sasasetsetan atu sapilakalakay a balungaan. adidaiay nu sapituping tu labangan a balungaan u aca hakiya mikikaka tu nu udipay a kadideng hakiya mikikakaac tu ac, u sapatahekal hakiya yadah tu, pasu paya nu aca, sasaluimengan i minatu a sapatahekal, sakay banangan a sapatahekalan, mapeci' sapisanga, papadumaan tu duguan, pacunaay a sakakaay nu sapatahekalan, mikuwanay a midiputy, hukin tu a kakalisiwan, sisa u siidaay ku mahiniay a aaidangan, anu idaw ku nu udip a mahiniay a balungaan u sakaudip atu sakay syakay nu mamamelawan. caayay pakaala tina mahiniay a aca nu balungaan, idaw ku suyen nanay idaw ku cukibalay nanay tu sapisingsingan. . sakay piliwkuan nu balungaan u mikacaway a tademaw kanca talakaw ku nipiyukiwan, sisa u sapisanga tu balungaan a zayliwan talakaw tu ku nipiyukiw. amica ku bangcal nu hekal, sademsem enengan, nipisangaan nu zayliwan ahican a caay kaw kapahay pasukikay atu ancin aw kapahay namin. ayda u sangan tu balungan nu udipan a zayliwan u malatusaay namin ku zayliw, mahini tanektek ku mahiniay a sangan nu balungaan, kudeced, bangcal ku hekal, kapah ku culil. udip nu balunga a malatusaay nu zayliwan a hekal mu nu mukin a galasuan ku zayliw, galasu nu mukin u galasu sikeliway ku sapicunus tu icelang nu zayliw atu nuli nu kilang ku sapaduhepit a mamaduhepitay nu zayliwan, sakaylabu a zayliwan i teban hina u pa-sa-cin-mu ((BALTEK nu kilangan) atu sibulangay nu teban a zayliwan (ALREX nu kilangan). i 50 ce katukuh i 80 ce ku kaku nu balungan, kakenihen misausi u kayakayay nu balunga, sakatayda i pabaw nu sapadan atu hekal nu balungan makayda i pabaw katukuh i sasa. kayakayay nu balunga kanca macunu tu cacayay a sapacuna nu tademaw. makaylalabuan a sangan, kanca idaw ku tapang nu kakabian, tahudan nu labang, kakabian nu labang, paladah atu sapianmuoan, u tanayu kuhan. (BALTEKÁ≥ĽŚąó)šĽ•ŚŹäś≥°ś≤ęŤäĮśĚź(AIREXÁ≥ĽŚąó).šĽ•50ŚĎéŤá≥80 . sisingpukiay nu balungaťĘ®śČáŤČá sisingpukiay nu balunga (Fanboat,Airboat), atu pangangan han u sisingpukiay a balunga, duhepicay singpukiay nu balunga, u siizingay nu kulupilaan mibabelihay ku nipabali tu bali talaayaway nu duhepicay a balungaan, ya ingzing atu kulupila mapaedep i mukinan, metalaw a mahica ku balunga, aadupan atu mikacaway a labang metalaw kaletepan a maduka. pasayda i nikudan ku nikasibalian tu sapacumud i labu nu balungaan, nu pasidikuday a bali ku mamikuwa tu pasacuwaay a balian, hina i sakay lanulanuan atu sakayhekahekalan tu sakatasasaan nu kulupila caay kaw aitida. ťĘ®śČáŤČá(Fanboat,Airboat), . likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ sayaway nu kulupilaay a balunga u ci la'cusan a tadukan , u Ya-li-san-ta.Ke-la-han-mu. Pey-e-se ha-ka-si nu mililiday a masakaputay itini i caysiwseplim mihcaan misangan tu Ciw-na-ta a Sin-su-ke-sia. u nanaman tu cacancanan a inzingna atu kulupila a sapatidengan. . liwsin lalangawanśĶĀŤ°ĆśĖáŚĆĖ kulupila a balungaan itida i tusepcaylim mihcaan sayaway nipanganganan u mikuwangay nu sasalamaan " kalepacawan nu kitidaan: pacici malepacaw"(Battlefield: Hardline) sapacabay tu M134 " mikacaway tu sakalelpacaw a duguan" nu nanum atu i dadanan nu balungaan a sakatahekal, cacukaymasan mahida u " kalepacawan nu igaan 4: malawilaway nu bali a kugun" nu dadanay atu bayuay a mabesuay nu balungaan. "(Battlefield: Hardline)šł≠śź≠ťÖćM134 .
S.PHON: == mitupinaj tu r~…ĺabaŇč a bar~…ĺuŇča ** == mitupinaj tu r~…ĺabaŇč a bar~…ĺuŇča (igu: ja ¶ńßt, namaka ńß…ô-r~…ĺan a kamuan: ja ¶ńßt ) u sakaj papańßanńßanan nu kawawan " mańßida u pa ¶unaaj, papa ¶…ômutan tu butiŇč, kapur~…ĺuŇčan masakaputaj, sasas…ôts…ôtan sa" a mi ¶apiaj tu dadipasan nanaj a bajuan " r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a nanum" atu mininiŇčgukajaj a bajuan " sumir~…ĺawaj a nanum" nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, mińß…ôr~…ĺupaj tu bar~…ĺi nu pajapajan a bar~…ĺuŇčaan " sair~…ĺiŇč jańßt", sisapadaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan " ńßjdrofoir~…ĺ ja ¶ńßt", sib…ôsuaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan " ńßo*…ôr ¶raft ja ¶ńßt", r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj sisapadaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan " ground …ôff…ô ¶t wiŇč ja ¶ńßt", ńßunsiki a bar~…ĺuŇčaan " j…ôt ja ¶ńßt" atu kikajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan " motor ja ¶ńßt" …ôn…ôm a kasasidumaan. ajdaaj a imian ina bar~…ĺuŇčaan u ¶aaj sipakajda i tur~…ĺaku mika ¶aw a patasasa, u adidiaj a minatuan musar~…ĺuim…ôŇč a ¶aaj kaw tabakiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, i nu udip ta a bar~…ĺuŇčan ku mańßiniaj. ńßu ¶unu tanaju a bar~…ĺuŇča makaar~…ĺa tu *.****.* kun- ¶…ô, tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan makaar~…ĺa tu ** kun- ¶…ô, mir~…ĺakujt tu ** kun- ¶…ô a mi ¶id…ôkaj tu nu tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan " sup…ôrja ¶ńßt". **(**:ja ¶ńßt,*****:ja ¶ńßt) ( ńßo*…ôr ¶raft ja ¶ńßt), . mańßiniaj a mitupinaj tu r~…ĺabaŇč a bar~…ĺuŇčaan ¶aaj kaw mat…ôk…ôsaj, ina tabakiaj nu kapańßaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan nu ajdaaj u sakapańßaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu sapitupin tu r~…ĺabaŇč a bar~…ĺuŇčaan ńßan sakaj sasas…ôts…ôtan atu sapir~…ĺakar~…ĺakaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan. adidaiaj nu sapitupiŇč tu r~…ĺabaŇčan a bar~…ĺuŇčaan u a ¶a ńßakija mikikaka tu nu udipaj a kadid…ôŇč ńßakija mikikakaa ¶ tu a ¶, u sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ ńßakija jadańß tu, pasu paja nu a ¶a, sasar~…ĺuim…ôŇčan i minatu a sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ, sakaj banaŇčan a sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺan, map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° sapisaŇča, papadumaan tu duguan, pa ¶unaaj a sakakaaj nu sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺan, mikuwanaj a midiputj, ńßukin tu a kakar~…ĺisiwan, sisa u siidaaj ku mańßiniaj a aaidaŇčan, anu idaw ku nu udip a mańßiniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan u sakaudip atu sakaj sjakaj nu mamam…ôr~…ĺawan. ¶aajaj pakaar~…ĺa tina mańßiniaj a a ¶a nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, idaw ku suj…ôn nanaj idaw ku ¶ukibar~…ĺaj nanaj tu sapisiŇčsiŇčan. . sakaj pir~…ĺiwkuan nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan u mika ¶awaj a tad…ômaw kan ¶a tar~…ĺakaw ku nipijukiwan, sisa u sapisaŇča tu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a zajr~…ĺiwan tar~…ĺakaw tu ku nipijukiw. ami ¶a ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, sad…ôms…ôm …ôn…ôŇčan, nipisaŇčaan nu zajr~…ĺiwan ańßi ¶an a ¶aaj kaw kapańßaj pasukikaj atu an ¶in aw kapańßaj namin. ajda u saŇčan tu bar~…ĺuŇčan nu udipan a zajr~…ĺiwan u mar~…ĺatusaaj namin ku zajr~…ĺiw, mańßini tan…ôkt…ôk ku mańßiniaj a saŇčan nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, kud…ô ¶…ôd, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, kapańß ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. udip nu bar~…ĺuŇča a mar~…ĺatusaaj nu zajr~…ĺiwan a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mu nu mukin a gar~…ĺasuan ku zajr~…ĺiw, gar~…ĺasu nu mukin u gar~…ĺasu sik…ôr~…ĺiwaj ku sapi ¶unus tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu zajr~…ĺiw atu nur~…ĺi nu kir~…ĺaŇč ku sapaduńß…ôpit a mamaduńß…ôpitaj nu zajr~…ĺiwan, sakajr~…ĺabu a zajr~…ĺiwan i t…ôban ńßina u pa-sa- ¶in-mu ((bar~…ĺt…ôk nu kir~…ĺaŇčan) atu sibur~…ĺaŇčaj nu t…ôban a zajr~…ĺiwan (ar~…ĺ*…ô* nu kir~…ĺaŇčan). i ** ¶…ô katukuńß i ** ¶…ô ku kaku nu bar~…ĺuŇčan, kak…ônińß…ôn misausi u kajakajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča, sakatajda i pabaw nu sapadan atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇčan makajda i pabaw katukuńß i sasa. kajakajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča kan ¶a ma ¶unu tu ¶a ¶ajaj a sapa ¶una nu tad…ômaw. makajr~…ĺar~…ĺabuan a saŇčan, kan ¶a idaw ku tapaŇč nu kakabian, tańßudan nu r~…ĺabaŇč, kakabian nu r~…ĺabaŇč, par~…ĺadańß atu sapianmuoan, u tanaju kuńßan. (bar~…ĺt…ôk**)******(ai*…ô***).******* . sisiŇčpukiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča*** sisiŇčpukiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča (fanboat,airboat), atu paŇčaŇčan ńßan u sisiŇčpukiaj a bar~…ĺuŇča, duńß…ôpi ¶aj siŇčpukiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča, u siiziŇčaj nu kur~…ĺupir~…ĺaan mibab…ôr~…ĺińßaj ku nipabar~…ĺi tu bar~…ĺi tar~…ĺaajawaj nu duńß…ôpi ¶aj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, ja iŇčziŇč atu kur~…ĺupir~…ĺa mapa…ôd…ôp i mukinan, m…ôtar~…ĺaw a mańßi ¶a ku bar~…ĺuŇča, aadupan atu mika ¶awaj a r~…ĺabaŇč m…ôtar~…ĺaw kar~…ĺ…ôt…ôpan a maduka. pasajda i nikudan ku nikasibar~…ĺian tu sapa ¶umud i r~…ĺabu nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, nu pasidikudaj a bar~…ĺi ku mamikuwa tu pasa ¶uwaaj a bar~…ĺian, ńßina i sakaj r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan atu sakajńß…ôkańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu sakatasasaan nu kur~…ĺupir~…ĺa ¶aaj kaw aitida. ***(fanboat,airboat), . r~…ĺikisi** sajawaj nu kur~…ĺupir~…ĺaaj a bar~…ĺuŇča u ¶i r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usan a tadukan , u ja-r~…ĺi-san-ta.k…ô-r~…ĺa-ńßan-mu. p…ô-…ô-s…ô ńßa-ka-si nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a masakaputaj itini i ¶ajsiws…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan misaŇčan tu ¶iw-na-ta a sin-su-k…ô-sia. u nanaman tu ¶a ¶an ¶anan a inziŇčna atu kur~…ĺupir~…ĺa a sapatid…ôŇčan. . r~…ĺiwsin r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan**** kur~…ĺupir~…ĺa a bar~…ĺuŇčaan itida i tus…ôp ¶ajr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan sajawaj nipaŇčaŇčanan u mikuwaŇčaj nu sasar~…ĺamaan " kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu kitidaan: pa ¶i ¶i mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw"(battr~…ĺ…ôfi…ôr~…ĺd: ńßardr~…ĺin…ô) sapa ¶abaj tu m*** " mika ¶awaj tu sakar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺpa ¶aw a duguan" nu nanum atu i dadanan nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ, ¶a ¶ukajmasan mańßida u " kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu igaan *: mar~…ĺawir~…ĺawaj nu bar~…ĺi a kugun" nu dadanaj atu bajuaj a mab…ôsuaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan. "(battr~…ĺ…ôfi…ôr~…ĺd: ńßardr~…ĺin…ô)***m*** .
S.FORM: == mitupinay tu labang a balunga ťĀäŤČá == mitupinay tu labang a balunga (igu: yacht, namaka He-lan a kamuan: jacht ) u sakay papahanhanan nu kawawan " mahida u pacunaay, papacemutan tu buting, kapulungan masakaputay, sasasetsetan sa" a micapiay tu dadipasan nanay a bayuan " langdaway a nanum" atu minininggukayay a bayuan " sumilaway a nanum" nu balungaan, mihelupay tu bali nu payapayan a balungaan " sailing yaht", sisapaday a balungaan " hydrofoil yacht", sibesuay a balungaan " hovercraft Yacht", lalaay sisapaday nu balungaan " Ground Effect Wing Yacht", hunsiki a balungaan " jet yacht" atu kikayay nu balungaan " motor yacht" enem a kasasidumaan. aydaay a imian ina balungaan u caay sipakayda i tulaku mikacaw a patasasa, u adidiay a minatuan musaluimeng a caay kaw tabakiay nu balungaan, i nu udip ta a balungan ku mahiniay. hucunu tanayu a balunga makaala tu 9.8‚ÄĒ10.7 kun-ce, tabakiay a balungaan makaala tu 30 kun-ce, milakuyt tu 61 kun-ce a micidekay tu nu tabakiay a balungaan " superyacht". ťĀäŤČá(ŤčĪŤ™ě:yacht,śļźŤá™Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:jacht) ( hovercraft Yacht), . mahiniay a mitupinay tu labang a balungaan caay kaw matekesay, ina tabakiay nu kapahay a balungaan nu aydaay u sakapahay a balungaan, pangangan han tu sapitupin tu labang a balungaan han sakay sasasetsetan atu sapilakalakay a balungaan. adidaiay nu sapituping tu labangan a balungaan u aca hakiya mikikaka tu nu udipay a kadideng hakiya mikikakaac tu ac, u sapatahekal hakiya yadah tu, pasu paya nu aca, sasaluimengan i minatu a sapatahekal, sakay banangan a sapatahekalan, mapeci' sapisanga, papadumaan tu duguan, pacunaay a sakakaay nu sapatahekalan, mikuwanay a midiputy, hukin tu a kakalisiwan, sisa u siidaay ku mahiniay a aaidangan, anu idaw ku nu udip a mahiniay a balungaan u sakaudip atu sakay syakay nu mamamelawan. caayay pakaala tina mahiniay a aca nu balungaan, idaw ku suyen nanay idaw ku cukibalay nanay tu sapisingsingan. . sakay piliwkuan nu balungaan u mikacaway a tademaw kanca talakaw ku nipiyukiwan, sisa u sapisanga tu balungaan a zayliwan talakaw tu ku nipiyukiw. amica ku bangcal nu hekal, sademsem enengan, nipisangaan nu zayliwan ahican a caay kaw kapahay pasukikay atu ancin aw kapahay namin. ayda u sangan tu balungan nu udipan a zayliwan u malatusaay namin ku zayliw, mahini tanektek ku mahiniay a sangan nu balungaan, kudeced, bangcal ku hekal, kapah ku culil. udip nu balunga a malatusaay nu zayliwan a hekal mu nu mukin a galasuan ku zayliw, galasu nu mukin u galasu sikeliway ku sapicunus tu icelang nu zayliw atu nuli nu kilang ku sapaduhepit a mamaduhepitay nu zayliwan, sakaylabu a zayliwan i teban hina u pa-sa-cin-mu ((BALTEK nu kilangan) atu sibulangay nu teban a zayliwan (ALREX nu kilangan). i 50 ce katukuh i 80 ce ku kaku nu balungan, kakenihen misausi u kayakayay nu balunga, sakatayda i pabaw nu sapadan atu hekal nu balungan makayda i pabaw katukuh i sasa. kayakayay nu balunga kanca macunu tu cacayay a sapacuna nu tademaw. makaylalabuan a sangan, kanca idaw ku tapang nu kakabian, tahudan nu labang, kakabian nu labang, paladah atu sapianmuoan, u tanayu kuhan. (BALTEKÁ≥ĽŚąó)šĽ•ŚŹäś≥°ś≤ęŤäĮśĚź(AIREXÁ≥ĽŚąó).šĽ•50ŚĎéŤá≥80 . sisingpukiay nu balungaťĘ®śČáŤČá sisingpukiay nu balunga (Fanboat,Airboat), atu pangangan han u sisingpukiay a balunga, duhepicay singpukiay nu balunga, u siizingay nu kulupilaan mibabelihay ku nipabali tu bali talaayaway nu duhepicay a balungaan, ya ingzing atu kulupila mapaedep i mukinan, metalaw a mahica ku balunga, aadupan atu mikacaway a labang metalaw kaletepan a maduka. pasayda i nikudan ku nikasibalian tu sapacumud i labu nu balungaan, nu pasidikuday a bali ku mamikuwa tu pasacuwaay a balian, hina i sakay lanulanuan atu sakayhekahekalan tu sakatasasaan nu kulupila caay kaw aitida. ťĘ®śČáŤČá(Fanboat,Airboat), . likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ sayaway nu kulupilaay a balunga u ci la'cusan a tadukan , u Ya-li-san-ta.Ke-la-han-mu. Pey-e-se ha-ka-si nu mililiday a masakaputay itini i caysiwseplim mihcaan misangan tu Ciw-na-ta a Sin-su-ke-sia. u nanaman tu cacancanan a inzingna atu kulupila a sapatidengan. . liwsin lalangawanśĶĀŤ°ĆśĖáŚĆĖ kulupila a balungaan itida i tusepcaylim mihcaan sayaway nipanganganan u mikuwangay nu sasalamaan " kalepacawan nu kitidaan: pacici malepacaw"(Battlefield: Hardline) sapacabay tu M134 " mikacaway tu sakalelpacaw a duguan" nu nanum atu i dadanan nu balungaan a sakatahekal, cacukaymasan mahida u " kalepacawan nu igaan 4: malawilaway nu bali a kugun" nu dadanay atu bayuay a mabesuay nu balungaan. "(Battlefield: Hardline)šł≠śź≠ťÖćM134 .
S.PHON: == mitupinaj tu r~…ĺabaŇč a bar~…ĺuŇča ** == mitupinaj tu r~…ĺabaŇč a bar~…ĺuŇča (igu: ja ¶ńßt, namaka ńß…ô-r~…ĺan a kamuan: ja ¶ńßt ) u sakaj papańßanńßanan nu kawawan " mańßida u pa ¶unaaj, papa ¶…ômutan tu butiŇč, kapur~…ĺuŇčan masakaputaj, sasas…ôts…ôtan sa" a mi ¶apiaj tu dadipasan nanaj a bajuan " r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a nanum" atu mininiŇčgukajaj a bajuan " sumir~…ĺawaj a nanum" nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, mińß…ôr~…ĺupaj tu bar~…ĺi nu pajapajan a bar~…ĺuŇčaan " sair~…ĺiŇč jańßt", sisapadaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan " ńßjdrofoir~…ĺ ja ¶ńßt", sib…ôsuaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan " ńßo*…ôr ¶raft ja ¶ńßt", r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj sisapadaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan " ground …ôff…ô ¶t wiŇč ja ¶ńßt", ńßunsiki a bar~…ĺuŇčaan " j…ôt ja ¶ńßt" atu kikajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan " motor ja ¶ńßt" …ôn…ôm a kasasidumaan. ajdaaj a imian ina bar~…ĺuŇčaan u ¶aaj sipakajda i tur~…ĺaku mika ¶aw a patasasa, u adidiaj a minatuan musar~…ĺuim…ôŇč a ¶aaj kaw tabakiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, i nu udip ta a bar~…ĺuŇčan ku mańßiniaj. ńßu ¶unu tanaju a bar~…ĺuŇča makaar~…ĺa tu *.****.* kun- ¶…ô, tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan makaar~…ĺa tu ** kun- ¶…ô, mir~…ĺakujt tu ** kun- ¶…ô a mi ¶id…ôkaj tu nu tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan " sup…ôrja ¶ńßt". **(**:ja ¶ńßt,*****:ja ¶ńßt) ( ńßo*…ôr ¶raft ja ¶ńßt), . mańßiniaj a mitupinaj tu r~…ĺabaŇč a bar~…ĺuŇčaan ¶aaj kaw mat…ôk…ôsaj, ina tabakiaj nu kapańßaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan nu ajdaaj u sakapańßaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu sapitupin tu r~…ĺabaŇč a bar~…ĺuŇčaan ńßan sakaj sasas…ôts…ôtan atu sapir~…ĺakar~…ĺakaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan. adidaiaj nu sapitupiŇč tu r~…ĺabaŇčan a bar~…ĺuŇčaan u a ¶a ńßakija mikikaka tu nu udipaj a kadid…ôŇč ńßakija mikikakaa ¶ tu a ¶, u sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ ńßakija jadańß tu, pasu paja nu a ¶a, sasar~…ĺuim…ôŇčan i minatu a sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ, sakaj banaŇčan a sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺan, map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° sapisaŇča, papadumaan tu duguan, pa ¶unaaj a sakakaaj nu sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺan, mikuwanaj a midiputj, ńßukin tu a kakar~…ĺisiwan, sisa u siidaaj ku mańßiniaj a aaidaŇčan, anu idaw ku nu udip a mańßiniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan u sakaudip atu sakaj sjakaj nu mamam…ôr~…ĺawan. ¶aajaj pakaar~…ĺa tina mańßiniaj a a ¶a nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, idaw ku suj…ôn nanaj idaw ku ¶ukibar~…ĺaj nanaj tu sapisiŇčsiŇčan. . sakaj pir~…ĺiwkuan nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan u mika ¶awaj a tad…ômaw kan ¶a tar~…ĺakaw ku nipijukiwan, sisa u sapisaŇča tu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a zajr~…ĺiwan tar~…ĺakaw tu ku nipijukiw. ami ¶a ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, sad…ôms…ôm …ôn…ôŇčan, nipisaŇčaan nu zajr~…ĺiwan ańßi ¶an a ¶aaj kaw kapańßaj pasukikaj atu an ¶in aw kapańßaj namin. ajda u saŇčan tu bar~…ĺuŇčan nu udipan a zajr~…ĺiwan u mar~…ĺatusaaj namin ku zajr~…ĺiw, mańßini tan…ôkt…ôk ku mańßiniaj a saŇčan nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, kud…ô ¶…ôd, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, kapańß ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. udip nu bar~…ĺuŇča a mar~…ĺatusaaj nu zajr~…ĺiwan a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mu nu mukin a gar~…ĺasuan ku zajr~…ĺiw, gar~…ĺasu nu mukin u gar~…ĺasu sik…ôr~…ĺiwaj ku sapi ¶unus tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu zajr~…ĺiw atu nur~…ĺi nu kir~…ĺaŇč ku sapaduńß…ôpit a mamaduńß…ôpitaj nu zajr~…ĺiwan, sakajr~…ĺabu a zajr~…ĺiwan i t…ôban ńßina u pa-sa- ¶in-mu ((bar~…ĺt…ôk nu kir~…ĺaŇčan) atu sibur~…ĺaŇčaj nu t…ôban a zajr~…ĺiwan (ar~…ĺ*…ô* nu kir~…ĺaŇčan). i ** ¶…ô katukuńß i ** ¶…ô ku kaku nu bar~…ĺuŇčan, kak…ônińß…ôn misausi u kajakajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča, sakatajda i pabaw nu sapadan atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇčan makajda i pabaw katukuńß i sasa. kajakajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča kan ¶a ma ¶unu tu ¶a ¶ajaj a sapa ¶una nu tad…ômaw. makajr~…ĺar~…ĺabuan a saŇčan, kan ¶a idaw ku tapaŇč nu kakabian, tańßudan nu r~…ĺabaŇč, kakabian nu r~…ĺabaŇč, par~…ĺadańß atu sapianmuoan, u tanaju kuńßan. (bar~…ĺt…ôk**)******(ai*…ô***).******* . sisiŇčpukiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča*** sisiŇčpukiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča (fanboat,airboat), atu paŇčaŇčan ńßan u sisiŇčpukiaj a bar~…ĺuŇča, duńß…ôpi ¶aj siŇčpukiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča, u siiziŇčaj nu kur~…ĺupir~…ĺaan mibab…ôr~…ĺińßaj ku nipabar~…ĺi tu bar~…ĺi tar~…ĺaajawaj nu duńß…ôpi ¶aj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, ja iŇčziŇč atu kur~…ĺupir~…ĺa mapa…ôd…ôp i mukinan, m…ôtar~…ĺaw a mańßi ¶a ku bar~…ĺuŇča, aadupan atu mika ¶awaj a r~…ĺabaŇč m…ôtar~…ĺaw kar~…ĺ…ôt…ôpan a maduka. pasajda i nikudan ku nikasibar~…ĺian tu sapa ¶umud i r~…ĺabu nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, nu pasidikudaj a bar~…ĺi ku mamikuwa tu pasa ¶uwaaj a bar~…ĺian, ńßina i sakaj r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan atu sakajńß…ôkańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu sakatasasaan nu kur~…ĺupir~…ĺa ¶aaj kaw aitida. ***(fanboat,airboat), . r~…ĺikisi** sajawaj nu kur~…ĺupir~…ĺaaj a bar~…ĺuŇča u ¶i r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usan a tadukan , u ja-r~…ĺi-san-ta.k…ô-r~…ĺa-ńßan-mu. p…ô-…ô-s…ô ńßa-ka-si nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a masakaputaj itini i ¶ajsiws…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan misaŇčan tu ¶iw-na-ta a sin-su-k…ô-sia. u nanaman tu ¶a ¶an ¶anan a inziŇčna atu kur~…ĺupir~…ĺa a sapatid…ôŇčan. . r~…ĺiwsin r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan**** kur~…ĺupir~…ĺa a bar~…ĺuŇčaan itida i tus…ôp ¶ajr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan sajawaj nipaŇčaŇčanan u mikuwaŇčaj nu sasar~…ĺamaan " kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu kitidaan: pa ¶i ¶i mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw"(battr~…ĺ…ôfi…ôr~…ĺd: ńßardr~…ĺin…ô) sapa ¶abaj tu m*** " mika ¶awaj tu sakar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺpa ¶aw a duguan" nu nanum atu i dadanan nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ, ¶a ¶ukajmasan mańßida u " kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu igaan *: mar~…ĺawir~…ĺawaj nu bar~…ĺi a kugun" nu dadanaj atu bajuaj a mab…ôsuaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan. "(battr~…ĺ…ôfi…ôr~…ĺd: ńßardr~…ĺin…ô)***m*** .
